title: Padlock
description: Padlock adds keys, locks, and lockpicks for more protection from raiders.
body:
# Welcome to Padlock  

Padlock currently only works with its own containers.  
Due to a bug with the forge right click block event, it no longer supports all block entities.  
Instead Padlock adds three new containers.  
* Wooden Lockbox  
* Iron Lockbox
* Golden Lockbox
which can be locked and encoded using an Obsidian Lock/Key in the Locksmith Block!  
  
However players can still bust through them with enough  
conviction!  

Busted thru locks become damaged, and can not be reused.  

Clicking on a locked container with a key will let you open it,  
Sneak with key in hand to remove the lock!  

## Why use this mod?  
This mod adds security on modded servers without becoming
unraidable!

## Why not use this mod!  
A bug has been discovered with forge, where right clicking with a shield in your offhand
causes the rightclick block event to not be called properly when interacting with containers!  
Due to this, you can now only lock lockboxes.    
## Modpack Developers  
Feel free to include in your modpacks  

## ToDo  
1) Lock picking minigame  
2) Key Reader  
3) Lock Decoding (using broken locks, to figure out the code)  


## Credits
- [Retextured Lock/Key](https://dantepixels.itch.io/key-items-16x16)
